name: Passage Brief
description: Writing instructions from Plotwright to Scene Smith for drafting a specific passage. Defines goal, beats, choice intents, and expected outcomes. Passage Briefs are the bridge between Story Spark (structure) and Scene Weave (prose). They remain in Hot as working documents and are not exported to players. Terminology aligned with Twine/Twee for export compatibility.

fields.name: passage_title
fields.description: Human-readable title for the passage being planned

fields.name: target
fields.description: PID for the passage this brief describes (must match topology.passages[].pid)

fields.name: topology_passage_ref
fields.description: Reference to the topology passage (same as target, explicit for relationship tracking)

fields.name: topology_context
fields.description: Structural context: Hub, Loop, Gateway, or Linear

fields.name: goal
fields.description: What this passage accomplishes narratively (1-2 sentences)

fields.name: key_beats
fields.description: 2-4 story moments that must appear in the prose, in sequence

fields.name: choice_intents
fields.description: Contrastive choices with their intents and targets

properties.name: intent
properties.description: Clear verb + object describing what player does

properties.name: target
properties.description: PID this choice leads to (must match a topology link)

properties.name: outcome_difference
properties.description: How this path differs from sibling choices

properties.name: gate
properties.description: Diegetic condition if gated (empty if ungated)

fields.name: expected_outcomes
fields.description: What the player should understand after reading this passage (player-safe, no spoilers)

fields.name: open_questions
fields.description: Questions needing clarification from Lore, Style, or Curator before drafting

properties.name: resolved
properties.description: Whether this question has been answered

properties.name: micro_context
properties.description: Immediate reflection needed when converging from multiple paths

states.name: Draft
states.description: Brief is being written by Plotwright

states.name: Ready
states.description: Brief is complete and ready for Scene Smith

states.name: In Use
states.description: Scene Smith is actively drafting the passage

states.name: Archived
states.description: Passage has been completed and merged to Cold
